repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All five selected memories share the same core symptom as the current failure: the TilingData class for an AscendC operator (ca6k_*) lacks expected member fields (e.g., set_totalLength, totalLength, etc.), causing opbuild compilation errors. These memories offer complementary hints: some show the correct pattern of using setter calls (if the struct has setters) while others advocate direct assignment; together they provide a baseline for diagnosing the correct interface for ca6k_00322. Additionally, they are all from the same operator family (ca6k_*) and the same build stage (opbuild/TilingFunc), making them highly relevant for injecting into the repair context.
